narrative:
St. Henry South (precinct in Mercer County) has 694 registered voters, with 47.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 46.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 5.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 41.4 percentage points.
